name: Discord Ignore
description: Rule-based Discord message filtering and /cooldown slash command support for OpenClaw.

defaultCooldownMinutes.label: Default cooldown minutes
defaultCooldownMinutes.help: Default cooldown duration used by /cooldown and /cooldown on.

ignoredAccountIds.label: Ignored account IDs
ignoredAccountIds.help: Discord account IDs whose inbound messages should be ignored before agent dispatch.

ignoredLeadingStrings.label: Ignored leading strings
ignoredLeadingStrings.help: Message prefixes that should be ignored after Discord mentions are stripped.
